title: eriogonum trachygonum subsp. pringlei
intro: Eriogonum trachygonum subsp. pringlei, also known as Pringle's buckwheat, is a plant species in the buckwheat genus. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Eriogonum trachygonum subsp. pringlei can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a valuable plant for natural remedies.
